archetype: Retro-Futurism / Terminal Look mixed with Swiss Brutalist (Archetype 4/7 for technical precision)
domain_context: Developer Tools / Technical Workbench / CI-CD Pipeline

colors.surface: bg-[#111111] or bg-slate-900 (Use for inspector panels, inner cards)
colors.border: border-slate-800 or border-white/10 (Crisp 1px borders, NO soft shadows, NO glowing outlines)

fonts.headings: IBM Plex Sans, Chivo, or Geist
fonts.body: IBM Plex Sans, Inter (if others unavailable), or Geist
fonts.monospace: JetBrains Mono, Roboto Mono, or standard ui-monospace (CRITICAL: MUST use for IDs, paths, run states, statuses, and step numbers)

hierarchy.section_header: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500 mb-4

layout_and_spacing.page_structure: Flex layout. Main content area (flex-1) left/center, Right Inspector panel (w-80 or w-96, border-l border-slate-800, h-full, overflow-y-auto).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Dense control-room spacing. p-4, p-6. Container blocks should have rigid structures.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse styles. 1px borders separating all major sections.

blocker_card.style: Sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Flat background (bg-amber-950/10). 1px solid border-amber-900/50.
blocker_card.layout: Flex row. Warning icon left (amber), text center, CTA button right.
blocker_card.cta_button: Shadcn Button, size 'sm', variant 'outline'. border-amber-700/50 text-amber-400 hover:bg-amber-950/30 hover:text-amber-300.

stepper_pipeline.style: Compact vertical layout. Each step is a row.
stepper_pipeline.step_row: flex items-center gap-3 py-2 border-b border-slate-800/50 last:border-0
stepper_pipeline.step_status_icon: 16px or 20px. CircleDashed/Clock for waiting, AlertCircle/XOctagon for blocked, Minus for N/A.
stepper_pipeline.step_text: text-sm. Monospace font for pipeline step names is preferred.

states.na: text-slate-700 icon, text-slate-600 step name line-through or heavily muted

right_inspector.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Use w-full. TabList should be bg-transparent border-b border-slate-800 rounded-none h-auto p-0. TabTrigger should be rounded-none border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-cyan-500 data-[state=active]:text-cyan-400 data-[state=active]:bg-transparent px-4 py-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold.
right_inspector.details_section: Vertical stack of key-value pairs. Label: mono_label. Value: text-sm flex items-center gap-2 mono text-slate-200. Add border-b border-slate-800/50 pb-3 mb-3 last:border-0.

artifacts_empty_state.style: Subtle dashed border (border-dashed border-slate-800), p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center bg-slate-900/20

icons.usage: Use AlertTriangle for blockers, CircleDashed for waiting, Ban or MinusCircle for N/A, FileCode for artifacts. Use size={16} to keep UI dense.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT add soft shadows (`shadow-md`, `shadow-lg`). Use strictly 1px borders (`border-slate-800`) to define hierarchy.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use gradients or consumer SaaS aesthetics. The aesthetic is purely functional, dark, data-dense.
CRITICAL: Build the components using `.js` files, NOT `.tsx` files.
CRITICAL: EVERY interactive element, status badge, and pipeline step MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="blocker-cta-button"`, `data-testid="pipeline-step-compile"`).
CRITICAL: Ensure the right inspector tab content uses dense key-value pair layouts. Keep text sizes to `text-sm` and `text-xs`.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Use Lucide React for icons.
Implement Shadcn UI primitives but override their default rounded/shadowy styles to be sharp (`rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`, `shadow-none`).
